_readme: Edit the values in this file to update text on the website. Do NOT change any key names — only change the values. Multi-line headings use arrays; each item becomes a separate line.

heading: Analog culture.
Modern ritual.
hero.body: A Nashville listening lounge designed for premium cigars, curated vinyl, timeless conversation, and elevated evenings worth remembering.

experience.heading: More than a lounge. A sanctuary for ritual.
experience.body: Pressed & Aged is built for people who still believe in presence — the sound of a needle touching wax, the pace of a well-aged cigar, and the kind of conversation that cannot be rushed.

features.title: Premium Cigars
features.copy: A refined humidor experience with hand-selected cigars, thoughtful pairings, and a collector's eye for quality.

features.title: Curated Vinyl
features.copy: Jazz, soul, hip-hop, R&B, and deep cuts selected to shape the mood of every evening.

features.title: Timeless Conversation
features.copy: A room made for founders, creatives, travelers, locals, and people who appreciate atmosphere.

humidor.heading: Curated smokes for refined palates.
humidor.body: From everyday favorites to special occasion selections, the humidor is intentional — never overwhelming, never generic, always selected with taste.

spinning.heading: Music sets the room.
spinning.body: Weekly vinyl rotations create a living soundtrack for the lounge — soulful, intentional, and unmistakably Nashville.
spinning.recordText: Slow, intentional, and unmistakably Nashville. Jazz, soul, and quiet-storm R&B from a room that knows how to listen.

membership.heading: Belong to the room.
membership.body: Membership transforms Pressed & Aged from a place you visit into a culture you are part of.

events.heading: Nights worth dressing for.
events.body: Programming that turns the lounge into a destination for music lovers, cigar collectors, and culture seekers.

list.title: Vinyl & Vices
list.copy: Classic records, premium cigars, and slow conversation in a low-lit listening room.

list.title: Smoke & Sinatra
list.copy: Timeless vocals, tailored cigar pairings, and old-school lounge energy.

list.title: Bourbon & B-Sides
list.copy: Rare pours, deep cuts, and curated cigars for the collector at heart.

list.quote: Walking into Pressed & Aged feels like stepping into the best version of a Saturday night. The energy, the music, the smoke — there's nothing like it in Nashville.
list.name: Marcus T.
list.title: The Patron Member

list.quote: The humidor selection is thoughtful without being overwhelming. They actually know what they're putting in there — and the pairings? Outstanding.
list.name: Damon R.
list.title: The Collector Member

list.quote: I brought clients here for an evening and the lounge did all the talking. The vibe, the service, the vinyl — it closed the deal before the cigars were finished.
list.name: Priya N.
list.title: The Listener Member

location.heading: Nashville's best-kept listening secret.
location.body: Located in the heart of Nashville, Pressed & Aged is a destination built for those who appreciate the slower things in life — and the better ones.

reserve.heading: Reserve the mood before the night begins.
reserve.body: For date nights, celebrations, private gatherings, and evenings where the soundtrack matters. Fill out the form and we'll be in touch within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Premium cigars. Curated vinyl. Timeless conversation.
